name: Pureed Lentil Soup- Shawrbat "Adas Majroosha
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a saucepan and sauté onions and hot pepper over medium heat for 10 minutes.
2. Add remaining ingredients, except lemon juice, to the saucepan and bring to boil.
3. Cover and cook over medium heat for 25 minutes.
4. Puree; then return to saucepan and reheat.
5. Stir in lemon juice; serve.
Try this hearty soup.
